evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1237.7 over 34 trades with 5.3 minute median hold and average MAE only -74.3, but owns the worst -527 MAE. The worst row is high-extension/non-accelerating above VWAP with large pullback and rolling-high distance, while broad extended-VWAP filters would remove protected winners.
name: Charm Pin High-Extension Tail Box
risk: The same high-extension state can recover profitably; if the box captures too many charm-pin winners, score and total net profit will fall despite better MAE.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm_pin_pullback_long entry with high ES-VWAP extension, non-positive VWAP acceleration, large rolling-high/pullback distance, and setup quality above the tail-risk floor.
validation_metric: Worst MAE improves from -527 toward <= -403, charm_pin_pullback_long retains at least 90% of profile PnL, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, and fast_under_15m trades fall by no more than 3.
